title: Web Server Issues Detected (Nikto)
description: Nikto reported one or more potentially risky server-side issues.
impact: Server hardening gaps can increase exploitability and reveal additional attack paths.
likelihood: Medium for externally exposed web services with default or legacy configurations.
recommendations: Review Nikto-reported issues for true positive impact.
Apply server hardening baselines and disable unnecessary features.
Patch exposed software and remove default files/endpoints.
